prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of CRM stock, which typically exhibits annualized volatility around 35-40%. Confidence intervals are constructed using standard deviation scaling factors (0.67 for 50%, 1.28 for 80%, 1.65 for 90%) applied to estimated 20-day volatility of approximately 6.2%.
